# SECURITY API Endpoints — Authentication & Menu


---

## POST /api/auth/signup/activate

**Activate a self-registered account**

تفعيل حساب مسجَّل ذاتياً - Consumes an activation token and enables the account. RULE-SEC-032, RULE-SEC-033.

Operation ID: `activate`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

### Request Body

Schema: `ActivateAccountRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| token | string | Yes |  |  |

### Response `200` — OK

### Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| HTTP Status | Code | Why |
|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |
| BAD_REQUEST | INVALID_JSON | Endpoint accepts a JSON request body; GlobalExceptionHandler maps HttpMessageNotReadableException (malformed JSON) to this status for any @RequestBody, unconditionally. |

## POST /api/auth/forgot-password

**Forgot password**

نسيت كلمة المرور - Always returns a generic success response regardless of whether the email exists (RULE-SEC-038, anti-enumeration).

## POST /api/auth/login

**User login**

Authenticates user and returns JWT access token. Use this token in the Authorize button above.

Operation ID: `login`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

### Request Body

Schema: `AuthRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| username | string | Yes |  |  |
| password | string | Yes |  |  |

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `AuthResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| accessToken | string | No |  |  |
| expiresIn | integer (int64) | No |  |  |
| refreshToken | string | No |  |  |
| refreshExpiresIn | integer (int64) | No |  |  |

### Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| HTTP Status | Code | Why |
|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |
| BAD_REQUEST | INVALID_JSON | Endpoint accepts a JSON request body; GlobalExceptionHandler maps HttpMessageNotReadableException (malformed JSON) to this status for any @RequestBody, unconditionally. |

## POST /api/auth/login-token

**User login with complete user information**

Authenticates user and returns access token, refresh token, and complete user information including roles and permissions

Operation ID: `loginWithToken`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

### Request Body

Schema: `AuthRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| username | string | Yes |  |  |
| password | string | Yes |  |  |

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `UserInfo`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| accessToken | string | No |  | JWT access token for API authentication |  |
| expiresIn | integer (int64) | No |  | Access token expiration time in seconds | 900 |
| refreshToken | string | No |  | Refresh token for obtaining new access tokens |  |
| refreshExpiresIn | integer (int64) | No |  | Refresh token expiration time in seconds | 604800 |
| userId | integer (int64) | No |  | User ID |  |
| username | string | No |  | Username |  |
| enabled | boolean | No |  | Whether the user account is enabled |  |
| roles | array<string> | No |  | User's assigned roles |  |
| permissions | array<string> | No |  | User's permissions (flattened from all roles) |  |

**Response Example**

_(partial — only fields with a documented example are shown)_

```json
{
  "expiresIn": 900,
  "refreshExpiresIn": 604800
}
```

### Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| HTTP Status | Code | Why |
|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |
| BAD_REQUEST | INVALID_JSON | Endpoint accepts a JSON request body; GlobalExceptionHandler maps HttpMessageNotReadableException (malformed JSON) to this status for any @RequestBody, unconditionally. |

**User logout**

## POST /api/auth/refresh

**Refresh access token**

Refreshes the access token using the refresh token cookie

Operation ID: `refresh`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `AuthResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| accessToken | string | No |  |  |
| expiresIn | integer (int64) | No |  |  |
| refreshToken | string | No |  |  |
| refreshExpiresIn | integer (int64) | No |  |  |

## POST /api/auth/reset-password

**Reset password**

استعادة كلمة المرور - Consumes a password reset token and sets a new password. RULE-SEC-032, RULE-SEC-033.

Operation ID: `resetPassword`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

### Request Body

Schema: `ResetPasswordRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| token | string | Yes |  |  |
| newPassword | string | Yes | maxLength: 120; minLength: 6 |  |

### Response `200` — OK

### Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

## POST /api/auth/signup

**Self-registration sign up**

إنشاء حساب ذاتي - Creates a new self-registered account (disabled until activated via email link). RULE-SEC-030, RULE-SEC-040, RULE-SEC-041.

Operation ID: `signup`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

### Request Body

Schema: `SignupRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| username | string | Yes | maxLength: 80; minLength: 3 |  |
| email | string | Yes | maxLength: 150 |  |
| password | string | Yes | maxLength: 120; minLength: 6 |  |

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `SignupResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| userId | integer (int64) | No |  |  |
| username | string | No |  |  |
| enabled | boolean | No |  |  |

### Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| HTTP Status | Code | Why |
|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |
| BAD_REQUEST | INVALID_JSON | Endpoint accepts a JSON request body; GlobalExceptionHandler maps HttpMessageNotReadableException (malformed JSON) to this status for any @RequestBody, unconditionally. |

## GET /api/menu/user-menu

**Get user menu based on permissions**

Returns menu tree structure for current logged-in user. Shows only pages where user has VIEW permission.

Operation ID: `getUserMenu`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `array of MenuItemDto`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer (int64) | No |  |  |
| pageCode | string | No |  |  |
| nameAr | string | No |  |  |
| nameEn | string | No |  |  |
| routePath | string | No |  |  |
| parentId | integer (int64) | No |  |  |
| permCode | string | No |  |  |
| module | string | No |  |  |
| displayOrder | integer (int32) | No |  |  |
| icon | string | No |  |  |
| isActive | boolean | No |  |  |
| description | string | No |  |  |

### Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| HTTP Status | Code | Why |
|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |

---

## GET /api/menu/user-menu/{userId}

**Get menu for specific user (Admin)**

Admin: View menu structure for any user. Useful for debugging permission issues.

Operation ID: `getUserMenuById`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: USER_VIEW (found on controller)

### Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| userId | integer | Yes |  |

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `array of MenuItemDto`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |

| id | integer (int64) | No |  |  |
| pageCode | string | No |  |  |
| nameAr | string | No |  |  |
| nameEn | string | No |  |  |

| icon | string | No |  |  |

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.
